description: You are an Executive Assistant auditing your boss's email drafts. Complete the unfinished proposal to 'client.relations@strategic-partners.com' by adding the text "initial draft of the Q3 report for your review." and sending the email. Delete the draft with the subject "Taco Tuesday?" while leaving all other drafts, such as the Invoice query, untouched.

metadata.required_body_text: initial draft of the Q3 report for your review
